text: The Vision of the Lampstand and Olive Trees

segments.text: Then the angel who was speaking with me returned and woke me, as a man is awakened from his sleep.
What do you see?
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: he asked.
I see a solid gold lampst and,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I replied,
with a bowl at the top and seven lamps on it, with seven spouts to the lamps.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: There are also two olive trees beside it, one on the right side of the bowl and the other on its left.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: What are these, my lord?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I asked the angel who was speaking with me.
Do you not know what they are?
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: replied the angel.
No, my lord,
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: I answered.
So he said to me,
This is the word of the LORD to Zerubbabel: Not by might nor by power, but by My Spirit, says the LORD of Hosts.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: What are you, O great mountain? Before Zerubbabel you will become a plain. Then he will bring forth the capstone accompanied by shouts of ‘Grace, grace to it!’
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Then the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
The hands of Zerubbabel have laid the foundation of this house, and his hands will complete it. Then you will know that the LORD of Hosts has sent me to you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For who has despised the day of small things? But these seven eyes of the LORD, which scan the whole earth, will rejoice when they see the plumb line in the hand of Zerubbabel.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Then I asked the angel,
What are the two olive trees on the right and left of the lampst and?
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: And I questioned him further,
What are the two olive branches beside the two gold pipes from which the golden oil pours?
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Do you not know what these are?
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: he inquired.
No, my lord,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I replied.
So he said,
These are the two anointed ones who are standing beside the Lord of all the earth.
segments.speaker: Unknown
